use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Debug, Serialize, Deserialize)]
struct User {
    name: String,
    email: String,
    age: u32,
}

#[derive(Debug, Serialize, Deserialize)]
struct UserProfile {
    display_name: String,
    contact_email: String,
}

fn convert_user_to_profile(user: &User) -> Result<UserProfile, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let value = serde_json::to_value(user)?;
    let profile = serde_json::from_value(value)?;
    Ok(profile)
}

fn roundtrip_via_string(user: &User) -> Result<UserProfile, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let json_str = serde_json::to_string(user)?;
    let profile = serde_json::from_str(&json_str)?;
    Ok(profile)
}

fn main() {
    let user = User {
        name: "Alice".into(),
        email: "alice@example.com".into(),
        age: 30,
    };
    let profile = convert_user_to_profile(&user).unwrap();
    let profile2 = roundtrip_via_string(&user).unwrap();
}
